subject: Re: Lease Renewal Notice - 485 Sunbury Road Unit 2C
body:
Hi,

Thank you for the renewal offer. I'd like to sign the 12-month renewal at $1,340/month. Could you send the agreement electronically? I'll have it back to you well before July 15.

One question - does the renewal include the same parking spot (B-12)?

Andrea Kaminski
Unit 2C

subject: Questions ahead of our June 17 call - Fisher MBA
body:
Jamie,

Looking forward to our call on June 17. A few questions I want to make sure we cover:

1. How many students in a typical cohort, and how much group project work is involved?
2. Are there any analytics or marketing-specific electives?
3. What does alumni engagement look like for Columbus-based graduates?
4. Scholarship or assistantship options for working professionals?

See you Tuesday.

Andrea

subject: Inquiry - Kelley Direct MBA Program for Working Professionals
body:
Hello,

I'm a marketing analyst with about 5 years of experience looking into part-time and online MBA programs for fall 2027 enrollment. I came across the Kelley Direct program and had a few questions:

1. What is the typical time commitment per week?
2. Are in-person residencies required, and where are they held?
3. Do you offer a marketing or analytics concentration?

I'm based in Columbus, OH. Thank you for any information you can share.

Andrea Kaminski

subject: Thank you - end of Q2 check-in
body:
Tom,

Just wanted to say thank you for the positive feedback in yesterday's check-in. The Q4 project is a big lift and I really appreciate knowing the direction feels right. I'm excited about the vertical segmentation work Priya has in review.

Looking forward to the July planning session.

Andrea

subject: Dinner reservation follow-up - party of 4, June 20
body:
Hi there,

I made a reservation for 4 on June 20 at 7:30 PM under Kaminski. Could you confirm the reservation is set and whether you can accommodate a gluten-free request for one guest?

Thank you,
Andrea Kaminski

subject: Harvest Moon dinner - confirmed for the 20th!
body:
Rach,

Harvest Moon is locked in for June 20, 7:30 PM - just confirmed. Party of 4 (us + whoever you're bringing). Let me know who the plus one is so I can add to the rez.

So excited. Dress code is whatever - I'm going smart casual.

Andrea

subject: Re: summer visit
body:
Meg,

Yes, the first weekend in August works for me. I'll drive up to Akron Friday after work - should be there by 7. Can we do the farmers market Saturday morning like last year?

Tell the kids I'm bringing art supplies.

Love you,
Andrea

subject: Auto loan payoff inquiry - 2023 Mazda CX-30
body:
Hello,

I'd like to get the current payoff amount for my auto loan (account ending in the CX-30 purchased 2023). Could you provide the payoff amount as of June 30, 2026, and instructions for submitting a lump-sum payment?

Thank you,
Andrea Kaminski
614-555-0201

subject: Quick question on the CPA fix MR
body:
Priya,

Looked over your CPA net spend MR - the logic looks correct. One thing I want to double-check before I approve: does the updated formula also propagate to the blended CPA in the executive summary section? Wanting to make sure we're consistent throughout the report.

Let me know and I'll get my approval in today.

Andrea

subject: Re: running Saturday
body:
Chloe!

Yes, Alum Creek at 6:30 - I'll meet you at the main parking lot by the dog beach. I'll bring an extra gel just in case. Supposed to be 68 degrees which is perfect.

See you Saturday!
Andrea

subject: Fisher MBA - request for program brochure and application timeline
body:
Hello,

I'm interested in the Fisher College of Business MBA program for working professionals and would appreciate receiving a program brochure and the application timeline for fall 2027 enrollment.

I have a background in marketing analytics and am particularly interested in understanding the quantitative and data-focused coursework available.

Thank you,
Andrea Kaminski
andrea.kaminski@Finthesiss.ai

subject: Annual physical scheduling
body:
Hi,

I'd like to schedule my annual physical. I'm available weekday mornings before 9 AM or any time on Fridays. My last visit was June 2025.

Thank you,
Andrea Kaminski
614-555-0201

subject: Salesforce connector rate limit issue - context for Dan
body:
Marcus,

Before the Salesforce connector issue goes to Dan, can you share which client accounts are affected? That context will help him scope the fix correctly - whether it's just large accounts or all of them hitting the rate wall.

Andrea

subject: Question about the fall half marathon training group
body:
Hi,

I ran the Columbus Half last October and I'm looking to do it again this year. Do you offer a fall training group program? I run Monday/Wednesday/Saturday and would be interested in joining a structured group.

Thanks,
Andrea Kaminski

subject: Question about Premium billing cycle
body:
Hi Spotify Support,

I was charged on June 3 but my renewal date should be June 10. Can you confirm the correct billing date and whether any prorated credit was applied?

Account email: andrea.kaminski@Finthesiss.ai

Thank you,
Andrea

subject: Q4 benchmarking - impressions share gap in connector coverage
body:
Tom,

Wanted to flag proactively: our Google Ads connector doesn't currently pull impression share metrics, which we need for the competitive analysis section of Q4. Priya has a connector MR in review that adds this.

Given the Nov 20 deadline I want to make sure we have sign-off on expanding the scope. Can we add 15 min to the Thursday call to confirm?

Andrea

subject: Short North app designs are incredible
body:
Rachel!!

I just went through the high fidelity screens you sent over and they look SO good. The coral primary button is perfect. I have some minor notes but nothing structural - you nailed the nav flow.

When can we do a quick screen share to walk through the prototype? I'm free Tuesday or Thursday evening.

Andrea

subject: Cushion target - note to self
body:
Reminder to self on the emergency fund.

Target is 20000 by year end. Need to actually sit down and check whether the automatic transfer I set up is keeping pace or whether I am kidding myself. Pull the real numbers before the next budget review instead of guessing.

Do not touch the down payment fund for this.

Andrea
